page_content:
BIOE371 Linear Systems and Ordinary Differential Equations for Bioengineering Applications (3 Credits)

This class utilizes fundamentals in linear systems, including eigenvalues and eigenvectors, as well as linear differential equations, to study various problems in bioengineering and biological systems, with a particular emphasis on feedback, stability, controllability, and control design. Prerequisite: BIOE241; and must have completed or be concurrently enrolled in MATH246.
